zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry FitzHugh於1266年6月6日出生時，他的父親Hugh FitzHenry9歲，母親Albreda Steyngrave22歲。他於1292年之前與Eve de Bulmer結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年5月6日在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry FitzHugh于1266年6月6日出生时，他的父亲Hugh FitzHenry9岁，母亲Albreda Steyngrave22岁。他于1292年之前与Eve de Bulmer结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年5月6日在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry FitzHugh was born on 6 June 1266, his father, Hugh FitzHenry, was 9 and his mother, Albreda Steyngrave, was 22. He married Eve de Bulmer before 1292. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 May 1356, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry FitzHugh est né le 6 juin 1266, son père, Hugh FitzHenry, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Albreda Steyngrave, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eve de Bulmer avant 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1356, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry FitzHugh am 6. Juni 1266 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh FitzHenry 9 und seine Mutter Albreda Steyngrave 22. Er hat vor 1292 Eve de Bulmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1356 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzHugh è nato il il 6 giugno 1266, il suo padre, Hugh FitzHenry, aveva 9 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Steyngrave, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eve de Bulmer prima del 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1356, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry FitzHughが1266年6月6日に生まれた時，父Hugh FitzHenryは9歳，母Albreda Steyngraveは22歳であった。1292年以前にEve de Bulmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年5月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry FitzHugh(이)가 1266년 6월 6일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzHenry(은)는 9세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Steyngrave(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1292년 이전 Eve de Bulmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.6 June 1266–6 May 1356: 6 de junho de 1266–6 de maio de 1356
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzHugh nasceu em 6 de junho de 1266, seu pai, Hugh FitzHenry, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Steyngrave, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve de Bulmer antes 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1356, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry FitzHugh родился 6 июня 1266 г., его отцу по имени Hugh FitzHenry было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Steyngrave, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve de Bulmer перед 1292 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 мая 1356 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.6 June 1266–6 May 1356: 6 de junio de 1266–6 de mayo de 1356
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry FitzHugh nació el 6 de junio de 1266, su papá, Hugh FitzHenry, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Albreda Steyngrave, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eve de Bulmer antes de 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1356, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
